articles.title: Apple Reports Quarterly Earnings Above Analyst Estimates
articles.summary: Apple posted quarterly revenue and EPS ahead of consensus estimates, driven by stronger-than-expected Services segment growth.

articles.title: Apple Raises Guidance for Upcoming Quarter
articles.summary: Apple guided next quarter revenue slightly above the prior consensus range, citing steady demand across its product lineup.

articles.title: Analyst Upgrades Apple to Buy, Cites Services Momentum
articles.summary: A sell-side analyst raised their rating on Apple shares, pointing to accelerating high-margin Services revenue as a key upside driver.

articles.title: Apple Unveils New Product Line at Annual Event
articles.summary: Apple announced a refreshed product lineup at its annual product event, with shipping expected to begin next month.

articles.title: Apple Faces Regulatory Investigation Over App Store Practices
articles.summary: Regulators opened an inquiry into Apple's App Store fee structure, adding to ongoing scrutiny of the company's platform policies.

articles.title: Apple Declares Quarterly Dividend
articles.summary: Apple's board declared its regular quarterly cash dividend, payable to shareholders of record next month.

articles.title: Apple Shares Trade Higher Amid Broader Tech Rally
articles.summary: Apple shares moved higher along with the broader technology sector as investors rotated back into large-cap growth names.
